detailedResults.question: Tum kaun ho?
detailedResults.expected: Mera naam Vaani hai. Main ek AI based civic assistant hoon. Main citizens ki madad karta hoon civic problems report karne, government schemes ki information dene aur complaint status track karne me.
detailedResults.got: Mera naam Vaani hai. Main ek AI based civic assistant hoon. Main citizens ki madad karta hoon civic problems report karne, government schemes ki information dene aur complaint status track karne me.

detailedResults.question: Who are you?
detailedResults.expected: My name is Vaani. I am an AI based civic assistant. I help citizens report civic problems, provide government scheme information and track complaint status.
detailedResults.got: My name is Vaani. I am an AI based civic assistant. I help citizens report civic problems, provide government scheme information and track complaint status.

detailedResults.question: तुम कौन हो?
detailedResults.expected: मेरा नाम Vaani है। मैं एक AI based civic assistant हूं। मैं citizens की मदद करता हूं civic problems report करने, government schemes की information देने और complaint status track करने में।
detailedResults.got: मेरा नाम Vaani है। मैं एक AI based civic assistant हूं। मैं citizens की मदद करता हूं civic problems report करने, government schemes की information देने और complaint status track करने में।

detailedResults.question: Vaani kya hai?
detailedResults.expected: Vaani ek smart AI assistant hai jo logon ko government services aur civic complaints me madad karta hai. Yahan aap road, pani, bijli aur safai jaise issues report kar sakte ho.
detailedResults.got: Vaani ek smart AI assistant hai jo logon ko government services aur civic complaints me madad karta hai. Yahan aap road, pani, bijli aur safai jaise issues report kar sakte ho.

detailedResults.question: What is Vaani?
detailedResults.expected: Vaani is a smart AI assistant that helps people with government services and civic complaints. Here you can report issues like road, water, electricity and sanitation.
detailedResults.got: Vaani is a smart AI assistant that helps people with government services and civic complaints. Here you can report issues like road, water, electricity and sanitation.

detailedResults.question: Vaani क्या है?
detailedResults.expected: Vaani एक smart AI assistant है जो लोगों को government services और civic complaints में मदद करता है। यहां आप road, pani, bijli और safai जैसे issues report कर सकते हो।
detailedResults.got: Vaani एक smart AI assistant है जो लोगों को government services और civic complaints में मदद करता है। यहां आप road, pani, bijli और safai जैसे issues report कर सकते हो।

detailedResults.question: Tum kya madad kar sakte ho?
detailedResults.expected: Main aapko civic issues report karne, government schemes ke baare me batane aur complaint ka status check karne me madad kar sakta hoon.
detailedResults.got: Main aapko civic issues report karne, government schemes ke baare me batane aur complaint ka status check karne me madad kar sakta hoon.

detailedResults.question: What help can you provide?
detailedResults.expected: I can help you report civic issues, provide information about government schemes and check complaint status.
detailedResults.got: I can help you report civic issues, provide information about government schemes and check complaint status.

detailedResults.question: तुम क्या मदद कर सकते हो?
detailedResults.expected: मैं आपको civic issues report करने, government schemes के बारे में बताने और complaint का status check करने में मदद कर सकता हूं।
detailedResults.got: मैं आपको civic issues report करने, government schemes के बारे में बताने और complaint का status check करने में मदद कर सकता हूं।

detailedResults.expected: Namaste. Main Vaani hoon. Kripya bataye main aapki kaise madad kar sakta hoon.
detailedResults.got: Namaste. Main Vaani hoon. Kripya bataye main aapki kaise madad kar sakta hoon.

detailedResults.got: Hello. I am Vaani. Please tell me how I can help you.

detailedResults.got: Mujhe afsos hai ki aap pareshan hain. Kripya apni problem bataye. Main aapko solution dhoondhne me madad karunga.

detailedResults.got: I am sorry that you are worried. Please tell me your problem. I will help you find a solution.

detailedResults.question: Account kaise banaye?
detailedResults.expected: VAANI par account banana bahut easy hai. Sabse pehle VAANI website ya app open karein. Uske baad Sign Up / Register par click karein. Apna naam, mobile number aur password enter karein. Mobile par aaya OTP verify karein. Verification ke baad aapka account successfully create ho jayega.

detailedResults.question: How to create account?
detailedResults.expected: Creating account on VAANI is very easy. First open VAANI website or app. Then click on Sign Up / Register. Enter your name, mobile number and password. Verify OTP received on mobile. After verification your account will be successfully created.
detailedResults.got: Creating account on VAANI is very easy. First open VAANI website or app. Then click on Sign Up / Register. Enter your name, mobile number and password. Verify OTP received on mobile. After verification your account will be successfully created.

detailedResults.question: Account कैसे बनाएं?
detailedResults.expected: VAANI पर account बनाना बहुत आसान है। सबसे पहले VAANI website या app खोलें। उसके बाद Sign Up / Register पर क्लिक करें। अपना नाम, mobile number और password enter करें। Mobile पर आया OTP verify करें। Verification के बाद आपका account successfully create हो जाएगा।

detailedResults.got: You are welcome. I am glad I could help you. If you need to report any civic issue, know about government schemes, or check complaint status, you can ask me.

detailedResults.question: आपका नाम क्या है?
detailedResults.expected: मेरा नाम Vaani है। मैं एक AI based civic assistant हूं। मैं citizens की मदद करता हूं civic problems report करने, government schemes की information देने और complaint status track करने में।
detailedResults.got: मेरा नाम Vaani है। मैं एक AI based civic assistant हूं। मैं citizens की मदद करता हूं civic problems report करने, government schemes की information देने और complaint status track करने में।

detailedResults.question: Ye app kya karta hai?
detailedResults.expected: Vaani ek smart AI assistant hai jo logon ko government services aur civic complaints me madad karta hai. Yahan aap road, pani, bijli aur safai jaise issues report kar sakte ho.
detailedResults.got: Vaani ek smart AI assistant hai jo logon ko government services aur civic complaints me madad karta hai. Yahan aap road, pani, bijli aur safai jaise issues report kar sakte ho.

detailedResults.question: Isme kya features hain?
detailedResults.expected: Vaani me aap civic complaints register kar sakte ho, government schemes ki jaankari le sakte ho, complaint status track kar sakte ho aur volunteer help request kar sakte ho.
detailedResults.got: Vaani me aap civic complaints register kar sakte ho, government schemes ki jaankari le sakte ho, complaint status track kar sakte ho aur volunteer help request kar sakte ho.

detailedResults.question: What features does this have?
detailedResults.expected: In Vaani you can register civic complaints, get information about government schemes, track complaint status and request volunteer help.
detailedResults.got: In Vaani you can register civic complaints, get information about government schemes, track complaint status and request volunteer help.

detailedResults.question: इसमें क्या features हैं?
detailedResults.expected: Vaani में आप civic complaints register कर सकते हो, government schemes की जानकारी ले सकते हो, complaint status track कर सकते हो और volunteer help request कर सकते हो।
detailedResults.got: Vaani में आप civic complaints register कर सकते हो, government schemes की जानकारी ले सकते हो, complaint status track कर सकते हो और volunteer help request कर सकते हो।

detailedResults.question: Shikayat kaise darj kare?
detailedResults.expected: Complaint karne ke liye aap problem category choose kare, location bataye aur problem ka description likhe. Uske baad complaint submit kar sakte ho.
detailedResults.got: Complaint karne ke liye aap problem category choose kare, location bataye aur problem ka description likhe. Uske baad complaint submit kar sakte ho.

detailedResults.question: Complaint register kaise kare?
detailedResults.expected: Complaint karne ke liye aap problem category choose kare, location bataye aur problem ka description likhe. Uske baad complaint submit kar sakte ho.
detailedResults.got: Complaint karne ke liye aap problem category choose kare, location bataye aur problem ka description likhe. Uske baad complaint submit kar sakte ho.

detailedResults.question: How do I register a complaint?
detailedResults.expected: To file a complaint, choose problem category, provide location and write problem description. Then you can submit the complaint.
detailedResults.got: To file a complaint, choose problem category, provide location and write problem description. Then you can submit the complaint.

detailedResults.question: शिकायत कैसे दर्ज करें?
detailedResults.expected: Complaint करने के लिए आप problem category choose करें, location बताएं और problem का description लिखें। उसके बाद complaint submit कर सकते हो।
detailedResults.got: Complaint करने के लिए आप problem category choose करें, location बताएं और problem का description लिखें। उसके बाद complaint submit कर सकते हो।
